data.content: [implementation 2026-04-29] Branch worktree-knots-b4df-linked-store pushed at d59ca7d7. project_worktree::store_root_base_for resolves the primary worktree via git --git-common-dir; git_context now derives store_paths.root from it. Added unit tests in src/project_worktree.rs and an integration test in src/project_tests_ext.rs that creates a real linked worktree and asserts resolve_context yields primary .knots while keeping the linked path as repo_root. make sanity passed at 95.13% coverage.
